# hooks-public-org-is-manager-of

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for orgIsManagerOf

## Usage

```typescript
useOrgIsManagerOfQuery({ pEntityId: '<value>', pManagerId: '<value>', pUserId: '<value>', pMaxDepth: '<value>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useOrgIsManagerOfQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useOrgIsManagerOfQuery({ pEntityId: '<value>', pManagerId: '<value>', pUserId: '<value>', pMaxDepth: '<value>' });
```
